analysis_note: Workflow IDs verified in canonical config. War Room + AI Voice IDs should be captured from GHL UI when available.

workflow_layers.revenue_pipeline: Stage-triggered sales workflows — Cursor sets stage only, never enrolls
workflow_layers.operations: Always-on client ops automations bundled in Flux Ops retainers

wf_01_capture.name: 01 | New Lead Capture
wf_01_capture.purpose: Welcome, intake, speed-to-lead first touch, capture missing fields
wf_01_capture.cursor_role: Upsert complete contact at New Lead — workflow auto-fires

wf_02_qualify.name: 02 | Qualify + Trial
wf_02_qualify.purpose: Discovery sequence, score validation (75+), trial offer, CRM pitch
wf_02_qualify.cursor_role: Advance stage when score + required fields complete

wf_03_proposal.name: 03 | Proposal + Payment
wf_03_proposal.purpose: Pitch sequence, Stripe link delivery, follow-up cadence
wf_03_proposal.cursor_role: Assign fla_contract_ref + verify Stripe link — DO NOT re-pitch FLA-102–106

wf_04_onboard.name: 04 | Payment → Onboard
wf_04_onboard.purpose: Payment confirmed welcome, intake forms, delivery kickoff, internal handoff
wf_04_onboard.cursor_role: verify_close sets stage after Stripe payment — workflow auto-fires

wf_missed_call.name: Missed Call Text-Back
wf_missed_call.purpose: 24/7 speed-to-lead SMS — Flux Ops Starter+ deliverable

speed_to_lead.name: Speed-to-Lead Auto-Response
speed_to_lead.trigger: New form submit / inbound message / website form
speed_to_lead.purpose: Sub-60-second first response — Flux Ops Growth deliverable

review_request.name: Review Request Sequence
review_request.purpose: GBP review generation — Flux Ops Growth + GBP Management

lead_nurture_drip.name: Lead Nurture Drip
lead_nurture_drip.purpose: Long-cycle nurture for leads not ready to buy

war_room_sms_alert.name: War Room SMS Alert
war_room_sms_alert.trigger: Contact Added to Workflow (Zapier campaign enrollment)
war_room_sms_alert.purpose: SMS Jonathan + Heaven on critical deal events
war_room_sms_alert.cursor_role: war-room-alert skill sets contact notes then enrolls via Zapier campaign
war_room_sms_alert.verified_2026_06_26: Not in GHL workflow list (only workflows 01-12 exist)

ai_voice_workflows.intended_role: Inbound receptionist — welcome, qualify, route, log every interaction
recommended_triggers: Inbound call answered by AI voice
Callback Requested tag from voice intent
recommended_actions: Create/update GHL contact with call summary
Tag: Callback Requested | flux-ops-waitlist | brand-fusion-client as appropriate
Route billing → Heaven, contracts → Jonathan per routing rules
Escalate live issues: internal SMS via war_room_alert_ping
Enroll speed-to-lead or missed-call workflow if caller hangs up

voice_standards.opener: Thank you for calling Flux Labs Agency — this is [Name], how can I help you today?
voice_standards.urgent_escalation: Flagging as urgent — team will reach out within the hour
